name: I'm on the rim of an extinct volcano
description: I'm on the rim of an extinct volcano
hints: On the rim of the extinct volcano!
GO VOLC slides down into the volcano - one-way due to loose ash!
LOOK VOLC shows the interior far below. Be fully prepared before entering.
GO VOLC=inside volcano (8) - practically one-way! D=plain (7).

effects: Message: ash is loose, I slide down

notes: Volcano rim. GO VOLC slides to interior (8) - one-way! D=plain (7). Prepare fully before entering.
